name: Highland Sausage Roll
recipeIngredient: Remains of a pot of tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the meats finely and chop the onion very finely. Mix together.
2. Season with black pepper and allspice/thyme/Worcester sauce. Add 3 tbsp Port and mix well. Cover and let stand for several hours or overnight.
3. Soak prunes in cold tea for several hours.
4. Season sausagemeat with salt, roll into a sausage shape, and lay flat on baking sheet.
5. Place drained prunes over the meat. Damp one long edge of pastry with beaten egg, roll up carefully, and seal.
6. Alternatively, enclose sausage in decorative pastry plait: roll pastry to square, place sausage centrally, add prunes, damp ends of strips with egg, fold alternately from sides to create a plait.
7. Glaze top and make steam slits if desired. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for another 25 minutes or so.
